comparison_analysis:
=== Cognitive Pattern Comparison: NACC Dementia vs PPMI PD-MCI ===

Domain-by-domain comparison (NACC Dementia vs PPMI PD-MCI):
  Visuo-Exec: NACC=0.20, PPMI=0.96, diff=-0.77
  Recall: NACC=0.11, PPMI=0.84, diff=-0.73
  Abstraction: NACC=0.12, PPMI=0.79, diff=-0.67
  Naming: NACC=0.22, PPMI=0.82, diff=-0.60
  Orient: NACC=0.01, PPMI=0.61, diff=-0.60
  Attention: NACC=0.23, PPMI=0.71, diff=-0.48
  Language: NACC=0.13, PPMI=0.52, diff=-0.39

Clinical interpretation:
  - NACC Dementia shows more severe Delayed Recall impairment (0.11 vs 0.84), consistent with AD-typical memory deficits.

This pattern differentiation supports the model's ability to capture disease-specific cognitive profiles.
